Class GameRoom

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
public class GameRoom extends Object
Represents a single game room managing a distinct match, its controller, and connected players.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

    Constructs a new GameRoom.

    Constructs a new GameRoom.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameRoom

      public GameRoom(int roomId, String password, int requiredPlayers)
      Constructs a new GameRoom.
      Parameters:
      roomId - The unique ID of the room.
      password - The optional password for the room (can be null/empty).
      requiredPlayers - The number of players requested for the match.

    • GameRoom

      public GameRoom(int roomId, String password, String creatorNickname, int requiredPlayers)
      Constructs a new GameRoom.
      Parameters:
      roomId - The unique ID of the room.
      password - The optional password for the room (can be null/empty).
      creatorNickname - The player who created the room.
      requiredPlayers - The number of players requested for the match.

  • Method Details

    • getRoomId

      public int getRoomId()
      Gets the unique ID of the room.
      Returns:
      The room ID.

    • getGameModel

      public Game getGameModel()
      Gets the game model for this room.
      Returns:
      The game model.

    • getController

      public GameController getController()
      Gets the game controller for this room.
      Returns:
      The game controller.

    • getCreatorNickname

      public String getCreatorNickname()
      Gets the nickname of the room creator.
      Returns:
      creator nickname, or null if not known yet.

    • getRequiredPlayers

      public int getRequiredPlayers()
      Gets the number of players requested for this match.
      Returns:
      requested player count.

    • hasPassword

      public boolean hasPassword()
      Checks if the room requires a password.
      Returns:
      True if a password is required, false otherwise.

    • checkPassword

      public boolean checkPassword(String pwd)
      Validates the provided password.
      Parameters:
      pwd - The password to check.
      Returns:
      True if valid, false otherwise.

    • addPlayer

      public boolean addPlayer(String nickname, String pin)
      Adds a player to the room, storing their PIN for future reconnections.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The player's nickname.
      pin - The player's secret PIN.
      Returns:
      True if successfully added, false if the requested player count was reached or nickname is taken.

    • validateReconnection

      public boolean validateReconnection(String nickname, String pin)
      Validates a reconnection attempt.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The player's nickname.
      pin - The provided PIN.
      Returns:
      True if the player is in the room and the PIN matches.

    • containsPlayer

      public boolean containsPlayer(String nickname)
      Checks if the player is already registered in this room.
      Parameters:
      nickname - The player's nickname.
      Returns:
      True if the player is in the room.
